login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your information to create an account
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you?
verifyEmail.linkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

auth.localAuthNotice: This workspace now uses the local Laravel auth flow.
auth.localAuthHint: Sign in to manage brackets and match flow.

unauthenticated.title: Access Restricted
unauthenticated.description: This application requires authentication via LanCore. Please log in to LanCore and navigate to the competition from there.

errors.expiredSsoLink: The login link has expired. Please try again.
errors.ssoCallbackInvalid: Invalid SSO callback. Please try again.
errors.authServiceUnavailable: Could not connect to authentication service. Please try again later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name

password.title: Password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

language.managedInLanCore: Change your language in your LanCore profile.

landing.title: Welcome to LanBrackets
landing.subtitle: Tournament brackets and match-flow management for your LAN events.
landing.genericLanding: This page is the generic authenticated landing page for LanBrackets. Any user who is signed into LanCore can be logged into this app and verified here.
landing.name: Name
landing.nextStepDescription: Use this page to confirm that LanCore authentication completed successfully. Privileged users can continue into the bracket management interface.
landing.bracketAccessAllowed: Your role allows access to competitions and bracket administration.
landing.bracketAccessDenied: Your LanCore account is logged in, but competition management remains restricted to moderator, admin, and superadmin roles.
landing.hero: Brackets, matches & standings — all in one place.
landing.heroDescription: LanBrackets manages tournament formats from single elimination to swiss rounds. Generate brackets, report match results, and track live standings for your LAN competitions.
landing.featureFormatsBody: Single & double elimination, round robin, swiss, and group stages.
landing.featureLiveBody: Report scores, advance winners, and display bracket overlays in real-time.
landing.featureIntegrationBody: Participants and roles synced from LanCore. No duplicate sign-ups.
landing.footer: Powered by LanBrackets — Part of the Lan-Software ecosystem

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your tournament brackets and competitions.
dashboard.competitionsCanManage: Your role grants access to competition management. Create brackets, report results, and manage standings.
dashboard.competitionsRestricted: Competition management is restricted to moderator, admin, and superadmin roles.

competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.name: Name
competitions.noMatchesForStage: No matches generated for this stage.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {max} characters
